explorer_help.stdout:
usage: python3 -m recovered_strategies.biglotto.no_db_evidence_explorer
       [-h] [--artifacts-dir ARTIFACTS_DIR]
       {generate,list-adapters,show-adapter,list-subsets,show-subset,compare,shortlist,snapshots} ...

P365 no-DB evidence explorer for Big Lotto parity adapters. This module reads
only committed P363/P364 evidence artifacts and renders detail cards, pairwise
comparison rows, query snapshots, and a static HTML explorer. It does not open
or write a DB, import production registries, call adapters, re-score
strategies, deploy, or make future-performance or betting claims.

positional arguments:
  {generate,list-adapters,show-adapter,list-subsets,show-subset,compare,shortlist,snapshots}
    generate            generate all P365 explorer artifacts
    list-adapters       list adapter functions
    show-adapter        show one adapter detail card as JSON
    list-subsets        list subset detail cards as JSON
    show-subset         show one subset detail card as JSON
    compare             compare two adapters if pairwise evidence exists
    shortlist           show compact shortlist as CSV
    snapshots           emit query snapshots JSON

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --artifacts-dir ARTIFACTS_DIR
                        override artifacts output directory
